ogTitle: Karalee vs Karana Downs: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Karalee and Karana Downs.
heading: Karalee vs Karana Downs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Karalee, Queensland and Karana Downs, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Karana Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Karalee (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Karalee or Karana Downs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Karalee has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Karana Downs scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Karalee scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Karana Downs scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Karalee or Karana Downs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Karana Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
